parameters.jsCode: const b=$json.body||{};const h=$json.headers||{};function uuid(){return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g,c=>{const r=Math.random()*16|0,v=c==='x'?r:(r&0x3|0x8);return v.toString(16);});}const lead={schemaVersion:'1.0',leadId:b.leadId||uuid(),receivedAt:new Date().toISOString(),status:'received',source:{channel:b.channel||'web',campaign:b.campaign||'',adId:b.adId||'',referrer:h.referer||b.referrer||''},contact:{fullName:b.fullName||b.name||'',phone:(b.phone||'').replace(/[^\d+]/g,''),email:b.email||'',preferredChannel:b.preferredChannel||'whatsapp',consent:b.consent===true||b.consent==='true'},intent:{rawMessage:b.message||'',vehicleOfInterest:b.vehicleOfInterest||'',newOrUsed:b.newOrUsed||'',budget:b.budget?Number(b.budget):null,financing:!!b.financing,tradeIn:!!b.tradeIn,timeframe:b.timeframe||''},meta:{locale:'es-CO'}};function fsVal(v){if(v===null||v===undefined)return{nullValue:null};if(typeof v==='boolean')return{booleanValue:v};if(typeof v==='number')return Number.isInteger(v)?{integerValue:String(v)}:{doubleValue:v};if(Array.isArray(v))return{arrayValue:{values:v.map(fsVal)}};if(typeof v==='object')return{mapValue:{fields:fsFields(v)}};return{stringValue:String(v)};}function fsFields(o){const f={};for(const k in o)f[k]=fsVal(o[k]);return f;}return {json:{leadId:lead.leadId,lead,firestore:{fields:fsFields(lead)}}};
